name: Leek Arugula & Clam Sauce Over Spaghettini
recipeIngredient: 1 large Leek, white part only, trimmed and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and leek; sauté for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
2. Pour in white wine and cook until the liquid evaporates completely (about 2 minutes).
3. Stir in chopped clams with their juices and bay leaves. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Cook spaghettini in boiling salted water according to package instructions until it is tender but still slightly firm at its center. Drain well before adding the pasta to the skillet.
5. Combine the cooked pasta, clam mixture, and arugula in the skillet. Toss gently for 30 seconds.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Remove bay leaves and serve immediately.
